basic_info.title: Cannon Fodder 2: Once More unto the Breach
basic_info.review: A brilliant sequel that refines the original's formula with improved graphics, more complex levels, and deeper tactical options, maintaining the series' signature dark humor.

alternative_names: Cannon Fodder 2: Once More unto the Breach

play_today.details: The best modern experience - an open source port that fixes engine bugs, supports modern systems, and includes a campaign/map editor. Compatible with retail, Amiga, and GOG versions.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder v2.0.0
recommended_patches.description: Latest open source port with bug fixes, modern system support, and campaign editor

play_today.details: Best official version - comes pre-packaged with DOSBox for compatibility with Windows 10/11. DRM-free and verified for modern systems.

The original and historically definitive version. Community consensus on Reddit and Amiga boards consistently cites this as the 'best' due to the superior sound effects, music quality, and smoothest frame rate of the era. It represents the purest artistic vision of Sensible Software. However, playing today requires an emulator like WinUAE or a physical machine, which adds a layer of technical difficulty.

recommended_patches.name: WHDLoad Cannon Fodder
recommended_patches.description: A hard drive loader patch that removes the original SOS MFM copy protection, allows loading directly from a hard drive, and enables saving games to the hard drive with up to 180 separate save slots.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM Patch
recommended_patches.description: A patch that adds a simple saving mechanism to the original Amiga version, allowing players to save their progress via SRAM or password generation where the original game lacked this feature.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder Password SRAM
recommended_patches.description: A ROM hack that modifies the game to allow saving progress via SRAM or password generation, addressing the lack of native save states in the original 1993 release.

optimal_settings: CPU: Set to '68000' or '68020' with 'Auto' cycle exact mode for authentic timing
Chip RAM: Set to 1MB or 2MB to match original hardware specifications
Graphics: Enable 'Auto' resolution and 'NTSC' mode for correct color palette and frame rate
CPU: Configure as '68000' with 'Auto' cycle exact mode
Chip RAM: Set to 1MB for original experience
Graphics: Use 'Auto' resolution and ensure 'NTSC' mode is selected for accurate timing

play_today.details: Original DOS release - requires DOSBox or similar emulator for modern systems. Less convenient than GOG version.

The definitive modern experience via GOG.com or Steam. This version runs natively on modern OS without complex emulation setup. It includes the full original campaign, supports modern widescreen resolutions via community patches, and offers easy save states. The convenience of digital distribution and controller support makes it the most accessible way to play today.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder Engine
recommended_patches.description: An open-source reimplementation of the Cannon Fodder engine that runs natively on modern Windows, Linux, and macOS. It fixes compatibility issues, supports high-resolution displays, and allows playing both Cannon Fodder and Cannon Fodder 2 without DOSBox.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder 2 Special Effects Enhancement Mod
recommended_patches.description: A mod for Cannon Fodder 2 that adds visual enhancements such as dust effects during combat and marching, improving the visual fidelity of battles on modern hardware.

recommended_patches.name: Open Fodder
recommended_patches.description: An open-source engine reimplementation that allows Cannon Fodder and Cannon Fodder 2 to run natively on modern Windows systems with widescreen support, high-resolution scaling, and mouse/keyboard remapping.

recommended_patches.name: WHDLoad Cannon Fodder
recommended_patches.description: A hard-drive loader patch for the Amiga version that removes copy protection, enables loading from hard drives, and allows saving games to the hard drive with up to 180 separate save slots.

play_today.details: The standard PC port from 1994. This version is widely available and historically significant as the most common way the game was played on home computers. It is functionally identical to the Windows version but often requires manual DOSBox configuration to run on modern systems. It lacks the native integration of the modern Windows re-releases.

recommended_patches.name: OpenFodder Engine (DOS Source Support)
recommended_patches.description: While primarily a modern engine, OpenFodder allows users to load original DOS game files directly, bypassing the need for manual DOSBox configuration and providing native widescreen support.

recommended_patches.name: Cannon Fodder 2 Cheater Patch
recommended_patches.description: A utility patch that allows players to access every level of Cannon Fodder 2, bypassing level progression restrictions for testing or casual play.

optimal_settings: CPU: Set cycles to 'auto' or 'max' for smooth gameplay on modern CPUs
Graphics: Enable 'scaler=2xsai' or 'hq2x' for improved sprite scaling
Sound: Set 'mpu401=auto' and 'sbtype=sb16' for optimal MIDI and sound card emulation
CPU: Set cycles to 'auto' for dynamic performance adjustment
Graphics: Use 'scaler=2xsai' for a clean retro look on high DPI screens
Sound: Configure 'sbtype=sb16' and 'mpu401=auto' for full audio compatibility

description.synopsis: Cannon Fodder 2: Once More unto the Breach is a satirical action-strategy game where players command a squad of soldiers through a series of war-torn levels. Developed by Sensible Software, the game combines real-time tactical combat with dark humor, challenging players to manage individual soldiers, utilize diverse weaponry, and navigate destructible environments to complete objectives while avoiding the absurdity of military bureaucracy.
key_features: Real-time squad-based tactical combat with individual soldier control
Dynamic squad splitting and merging mechanics for strategic flexibility
Destructible environments where terrain can be altered by explosions
Varied soldier classes with unique weapons and abilities (e.g., medics, snipers)
Non-linear level design allowing multiple paths to objectives
Humorous narrative delivered through in-game radio chatter and cutscenes
Complex enemy AI with distinct behaviors for different unit types
Cooperative multiplayer mode supporting up to four players
Inventory management system for equipping soldiers with specific gear
High difficulty curve requiring precise timing and strategic planning
legacy_and_impact: Cannon Fodder 2 is widely regarded as one of the finest strategy games of the 1990s, particularly on the Amiga platform. It set a high bar for squad-based tactics and influenced later titles in the genre. Its cult status persists among retro gaming enthusiasts for its unique blend of humor and challenging gameplay.
